_comment: Single source of truth for CIS connection and active proceedings court. Edit this in the Data/ editor. Loaded by source/load_config.sh into env vars before any bridge/verifier run. UNLOCK_PASSWORD defaults to CIS_PASSWORD if absent; LOGIN_DATE defaults to today; LANG_ID=0; CLOUD_FLAG=N. COURT_NO is selected inside each CIS stage unless SKIP_COURT_SELECTION=true.
